signals.headline: Easter Ceasefire Collapsed | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Easter Ceasefire Collapsed | YES | HIGH confidence**

Russia and Ukraine agreed to a 32-hour Easter ceasefire from April 11-12, but both sides reported extensive violations within hours[4]. Ukrainian military documented 2,299 breaches by Russian forces, while Russia claimed 1,971 violations by Ukrainian forces[4]. Hostilities fully resumed after midnight on April 12, with Russia launching 98 drone

signals.headline: Institutional ETF Holdings Expand: BlackRock, Fidelity Record SOL Holdings; CME Futures Launch May 4 | YES | HIGH confid
signals.raw:
Institutional ETF Holdings Expand: BlackRock, Fidelity Record SOL Holdings; CME Futures Launch May 4 | YES | HIGH confidence**

BlackRock and Fidelity disclosed record SOL ETF holdings[1], and CME futures are launching May 4[5]. Interactive Brokers opened SOL trading to European investors via Zero Hash[3].
